name: han
description: 反 — Reversi (Othello) with a mind built from nothing. A dependency-free board and a genuine opponent: negamax with alpha-beta pruning, a positional weight map (corners are treasure, the squares beside them are traps), mobility, and an exact endgame solver that reads to the last empty square. No randomness — the same position always yields the same best move. Verifiably strong: it loses to no random player over hundreds of games, and deeper search beats shallower. Core knows neither DOM nor network.
